meta.notes: Opt-in daily 'what changed since you looked' digest for the token owner's household. The endpoint pushes each parent the OTHER parent's unseen facts/agreements/star changes on their own route, at most once per ~day (it self-suppresses when there's nothing new or the parent was digested recently), so a frequent poll like every 3h is fine — it just catches new activity promptly. Opening /kids (or tapping 'Caught up') marks the sheet seen and clears the backlog. Use a household member's per-user token so delivery resolves that household.
